##### `circleci mcp claude disable [flags]`

Remove server from Claude config

| Flag                   | Description                                                              |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `--config-path string` | Path to Claude config file                                               |
| `--server-name string` | Name of the MCP server to remove (default: derived from executable name) |
